text:
(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #1)

I have also encountered this problem since updating to 2.8.0. I'm very new, so I'm sorry if this is a waste of your time, but I can't figure out how to apply that patch. I'd be happy to test it if I could figure out what to do, heh.

Will the patch end up in the nano port or pkg sometime soon?
